subject: [PATCH v6 17/20] nfsd: add the filehandle to returned attributes in CB_NOTIFY

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds a new routine to compose a filehandle for CB_NOTIFY operations, which do not have access to the usual svc_export. The new routine uses only the parent filehandle and nfs4_file to fill out the fhandle field in the nfsd4_fattr_args. This allows the filehandle to be returned as an attribute in CB_NOTIFY responses.
